summary: Iteration 112 - Agenda Page Full Testing (Month/Week/Day Views): All 10 features tested and verified working. Backend APIs (my-timeline, external-events, import-settings) return 200. Frontend Month/Week/Day views all functional with correct navigation, event display, and NLYT event click navigation to /appointments/{id}.

backend_api: ✅ GET /api/appointments/my-timeline - Returns 200 with action_required, upcoming, past buckets
✅ GET /api/external-events/ - Returns 200 with events array (empty if no calendar connected)
frontend_playwright: ✅ Login flow: Navigate to /signin, login with igaal@hotmail.com / Test123!, redirect to /dashboard
✅ Month view (default): Calendar grid with French day headers (LUN-DIM), NLYT event dots (solid black)
✅ View selector toggle: 'Mois', 'Semaine', 'Jour' buttons exist and switch views correctly
✅ Month view: Click on day with events expands detail panel showing event list
✅ Week view: 7-day column grid with time slots (07:00-22:00), event blocks in correct columns
✅ Week view: Today (SAM 28) is highlighted with filled circle
✅ Week view: Clicking day column navigates to Day view for that date
✅ Day view: Time grid on left + event list sidebar on right
✅ Day view: Event count header shows '2 événements' / '3 événements'
✅ Day view: Event details show time, title, NLYT badge, type (Physique/Visio), role (Participant/Organisateur)
✅ Navigation: Prev/next arrows work in all view modes (month changes month, week shifts 7 days, day shifts 1 day)
✅ Navigation: 'Aujourd'hui' button returns to current date in all views
✅ NLYT event click: Navigates to /appointments/{id} from Month detail panel
✅ NLYT event click: Navigates to /appointments/{id} from Day view sidebar
✅ Legend at bottom shows NLYT (solid dot) and Google/Microsoft (hollow dot)
data_testid_verification: ✅ data-testid='agenda-day-detail' - Month view day expansion panel

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ AgendaPage correctly implements 3 view modes (month/week/day) with proper state management
✅ View-aware navigation: prev/next buttons adjust correctly per view mode
✅ Week view correctly calculates Monday start and shows 7-day range
✅ Day view shows time grid + event sidebar with proper event details
✅ NLYT events clickable with navigation to /appointments/{id}
✅ All required data-testid attributes present for testing
✅ French localization correct throughout (day names, month names, date formats)
✅ Today highlighting works in all views
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - user has multiple NLYT appointments on March 23-28, 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agenda page fully functional with 3 views (Month/Week/Day). Key routes: /agenda (AgendaPage). Navbar entries: navbar-agenda-link (desktop), mobile-nav-agenda (mobile). Month view shows calendar grid with event dots. Week view shows 7-day time grid with event blocks. Day view shows time grid + event sidebar. All views support prev/next/today navigation. NLYT events clickable → /appointments/{id}. External events (Google/Microsoft) non-clickable. Week view day column click navigates to Day view for that date.
